headline: GameStop’s Cohen: ’coming for eBay one way or another’
summary: Investing.com -- GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen said he will not back down from his pursuit of eBay Inc., despite the online auction company's rejection of his $56 billion takeover bid.

raw.headline: GameStop’s Cohen: ’coming for eBay one way or another’
raw.summary: Investing.com -- GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen said he will not back down from his pursuit of eBay Inc., despite the online auction company's rejection of his $56 billion takeover bid.

headline: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen Is ‘Coming for eBay One Way or Another’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- GameStop Corp. headline: UK competition watchdog clears eBay’s $1.2bn Depop acquisition
summary: The deal was first disclosed in February, when eBay agreed to acquire Depop from Etsy via an all-cash arrangement valued at $1.2bn.

headline: Wedbush Assumes eBay at Outperform, Announces Price Target of $135
summary: Wedbush  analyst Ygal Arounian   assumes eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $135.

headline: PayPal Unlikely to Bite on ‘Low-Ball’ $53B Offer from Stripe, Advent
summary: Despite its recent struggles, PayPal still has a massive 439 million consumer accounts while Stripe’s customers are mostly merchants.
